claims.name: CREAK truth Cohen's d
claims.statement: A ridge probe trained at the end-of-turn token (Gemma-3-27B, layer 32) discriminates true vs false CREAK claims at the user turn with Cohen's d under the default (neutral) persona.
claims.derivation: items with domain=='truth', turn=='user', condition in {true,false}; take `eot_scores["tb-5_L32"]`; pooled Cohen's d(true, false); round to 2dp.

claims.name: CREAK truth n true
claims.statement: Number of true CREAK claims in the end-of-turn base discrimination panel (user-turn framing, default persona).
claims.derivation: count of items with domain=='truth', turn=='user', condition=='true'.

claims.name: CREAK truth n false
claims.statement: Number of false CREAK claims in the end-of-turn base discrimination panel (user-turn framing, default persona).
claims.derivation: count of items with domain=='truth', turn=='user', condition=='false'.

claims.name: BailBench harm Cohen's d
claims.statement: A ridge probe trained at the end-of-turn token (Gemma-3-27B, layer 39) discriminates harmful vs benign BailBench and stress-test items with Cohen's d under the default (neutral) persona; negative sign reflects the benign>harmful projection convention in the scoring pipeline.
claims.derivation: items with domain=='harm' pooled over turn; take `eot_scores["tb-5_L39"]`; pooled Cohen's d(harmful, benign); round to 2dp.

claims.name: BailBench harm n harmful
claims.statement: Number of harmful BailBench/stress-test items in the end-of-turn base discrimination panel (pooled over turn).
claims.derivation: count of items with domain=='harm', condition=='harmful' (pooled over turn).

claims.name: BailBench harm n benign
claims.statement: Number of benign BailBench/stress-test items in the end-of-turn base discrimination panel (pooled over turn).
claims.derivation: count of items with domain=='harm', condition=='benign' (pooled over turn).

claims.name: Truth d under neutral persona
claims.statement: Cohen's d for true vs false separation under the neutral system prompt (end-of-turn probe, Gemma-3-27B L32).
claims.derivation: filter items to system_prompt=='neutral'; take `eot_scores["tb-5_L32"]`; pooled Cohen's d(true, false); round to 2dp.

claims.name: Truth d under lie directive
claims.statement: Cohen's d for true vs false separation under the lie_directive system prompt (end-of-turn probe, Gemma-3-27B L32); negative sign indicates the probe's evaluative readout has flipped.
claims.derivation: filter items to system_prompt=='lie_directive'; take `eot_scores["tb-5_L32"]`; pooled Cohen's d(true, false); round to 2dp.

claims.name: Truth d under pathological liar
claims.statement: Cohen's d for true vs false separation under the pathological_liar system prompt (end-of-turn probe, Gemma-3-27B L32).
claims.derivation: filter items to system_prompt=='pathological_liar'; take `eot_scores["tb-5_L32"]`; pooled Cohen's d(true, false); round to 2dp.

claims.name: Harm d under neutral persona
claims.statement: Cohen's d for harmful vs benign separation under the neutral system prompt (end-of-turn probe, Gemma-3-27B L39).
claims.derivation: filter items to system_prompt=='neutral'; take `eot_scores["tb-5_L39"]`; pooled Cohen's d(harmful, benign); round to 2dp.

claims.name: Harm d under sadist persona
claims.statement: Cohen's d for harmful vs benign separation under the sadist system prompt (end-of-turn probe, Gemma-3-27B L39); the distributions collapse.
claims.derivation: filter items to system_prompt=='sadist'; take `eot_scores["tb-5_L39"]`; pooled Cohen's d(harmful, benign); round to 2dp.

claims.name: Politics d under democrat prompt
claims.statement: Cohen's d for left vs right separation under a democrat system prompt (end-of-turn probe, Gemma-3-27B L39).
claims.derivation: filter items to system_prompt=='democrat'; take `eot_scores["tb-5_L39"]`; pooled Cohen's d(left, right); round to 2dp.

claims.name: Politics d under republican prompt
claims.statement: Cohen's d for left vs right separation under a republican system prompt (end-of-turn probe, Gemma-3-27B L39); negative sign indicates right>left.
claims.derivation: filter items to system_prompt=='republican'; take `eot_scores["tb-5_L39"]`; pooled Cohen's d(left, right); round to 2dp.

claims.name: Persona modulation d full
claims.statement: Per-(domain, system_prompt) Cohen's d for the appendix persona modulation full figure. Truth: true vs false (end-of-turn probe tb-5_L32). Harm: harmful vs benign (tb-5_L39). Politics: left vs right (tb-5_L39). Each cell = one bar in the three-panel figure.
claims.derivation: For each (domain, system_prompt): filter items; take `eot_scores[<domain probe>]`; pooled Cohen's d(pos, neg); round to 2dp.

claims.name: Cross training d
claims.statement: Signed Cohen's d at the end-of-turn token, one cell per (domain, probe family) bar in the cross-training-selector appendix figure. Positive = first-listed class scores higher (true / harmful / left).
claims.derivation: For each (domain, probe_family_prefix) cell: select the row matching domain and probe prefix from headline_table.csv; read `d`; flip sign for non-parent politics rows (right>left → left>right); round to 2dp.

claims.name: CREAK truth n claims prose
claims.statement: Approximate per-class sample size quoted in sec:induced-roleplay for CREAK true vs false claims at the user turn (also the n used in the base discrimination panel).
claims.derivation: row with domain=='truth (user)' and probe=='tb-5_L32'; `n_pos` column.

claims.name: CREAK truth CV accuracy
claims.statement: Cross-validated classification accuracy of the end-of-turn probe on CREAK true vs false at the user turn (tb-5_L32). Quoted as ~93% in sec:induced-roleplay.
claims.derivation: row with domain=='truth (user)' and probe=='tb-5_L32'; `cv_acc` column; round to 2dp.

claims.name: BailBench harm n items prose
claims.statement: Approximate per-class sample size of harmful BailBench + stress-test items used in the per-turn split; quoted as ~77 items in sec:induced-roleplay.
claims.derivation: row with domain=='harm (user)' and probe=='tb-5_L39'; `n_pos` column.

claims.name: BailBench harm CV accuracy user
claims.statement: Cross-validated classification accuracy of the end-of-turn probe on harmful vs benign BailBench + stress-test items at the user turn (tb-5_L39). One endpoint of the 84-89% range quoted in sec:induced-roleplay.
claims.derivation: row with domain=='harm (user)' and probe=='tb-5_L39'; `cv_acc` column; round to 2dp.

claims.name: BailBench harm CV accuracy assistant
claims.statement: Cross-validated classification accuracy of the end-of-turn probe on harmful vs benign BailBench + stress-test items at the assistant turn (tb-5_L39). Other endpoint of the 84-89% range quoted in sec:induced-roleplay.
claims.derivation: row with domain=='harm (assistant)' and probe=='tb-5_L39'; `cv_acc` column; round to 2dp.

claims.name: Per turn parent absolute d
claims.statement: Absolute Cohen's d for the task-averaged parent probe, one cell per (domain, turn), drawn as horizontal dashed reference lines in the per-turn appendix figure. Hard-coded parent-run summary; see headline_table.csv parent rows.
claims.source: manual: hard-coded parent-probe summary in the producer; see headline_table.csv parent rows
claims.derivation: Reference values hard-coded in fig_appendix_per_turn's `parent` dict; each cell is |d| for the task-averaged parent probe at the given (domain, turn) — see 'task_mean_L32/39 (parent)' rows of headline_table.csv.

claims.name: Per turn absolute d truth
claims.statement: Absolute Cohen's d at the end-of-turn token on the truth stimuli, one cell per (turn, probe family); rendered as bars in the per-turn appendix figure.
claims.derivation: For each (turn, probe): row with domain=='truth (<turn>)' and the given probe identifier; abs(`d` column); round to 2dp.

claims.name: Per turn absolute d harm
claims.statement: Absolute Cohen's d at the end-of-turn token on the harm stimuli, one cell per (turn, probe family); rendered as bars in the per-turn appendix figure.
claims.derivation: For each (turn, probe): row with domain=='harm (<turn>)' and the given probe identifier; abs(`d` column); round to 2dp.
